title: promotion_realization_package.v1
description: Bounded, signed package derived from canonical promotion. The ONLY permitted authoritative input for bridge realization.

promotion_uuid.description: Unique identifier for the promotion that produced this package.

candidate_digest.description: SHA-256 digest of the candidate artifact being realized.

runtime_class.description: Classification of the target runtime environment.

runtime_id.description: Unique identifier of the target runtime.

target_scope.description: Bounded scope within the target runtime.

artifact_refs.description: References to artifacts included in this change.

expected_capabilities.description: Capabilities the target must possess or preserve.

compatibility_requirements.description: Compatibility constraints that must be satisfied.

freshness_window.description: Maximum age of the package before it is considered stale (e.g. '3600s').

charter_hash.description: SHA-256 of the charter authorizing this work.

causal.description: Causal lineage for audit and traceability.

promotion_of.description: Identifier of the promotion this package represents.

derived_from.description: Source artifacts or promotions this package derives from.

issued_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the package was issued.

package_digest.description: SHA-256 digest of the stable package content for idempotency.
